title: Preparation of Binding Buffer (BB)
author: Nicola O'Reilly
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfd2ji8e
materials: Please select between the recipes for 2 L + 80 ml Binding buffer BB, 4 L + 160 ml Binding buffer BB and 5 L + 200 ml Binding buffer BB.

steps.title: Weigh out 955
steps.instruction: Weigh out 955.2 g, GuHCl and add to a 2 L beaker.

steps.title: Add 500 mL, freshly drawn milliQ
steps.instruction: Add 500 mL, freshly drawn milliQ . Stir and heat to 60 °C to dissolve.

steps.title: Add 80 mL, 3M sodium acetate , pH 5
steps.instruction: Add 80 mL, 3M sodium acetate , pH 5.2 .

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Tween-20
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Tween-20 . Stir well to mix.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store Binding Buffer BB buffer in...
steps.instruction: Store Binding Buffer BB buffer in a flammables cupboard at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Add 1000 mL, freshly drawn milliQ...
steps.instruction: Add 1000 mL, freshly drawn milliQ water to a 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Weigh out 1
steps.instruction: Weigh out 1.911 kg, GuHCl in aliquots using a 3 L beaker and carefully add to 5 L beaker. Stir and heat to 60 °C to dissolve. A sterile pipette may be required to stir.

steps.title: Once dissolved, make up to 4 L with Isopropanol (approx
steps.instruction: Once dissolved, make up to 4 L with Isopropanol (approx. 1600 mL ) using a 1 L graduated cylinder and transferring buffer to second 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Add 160 mL, 3M sodium acetate , pH 5
steps.instruction: Add 160 mL, 3M sodium acetate , pH 5.2 .

steps.title: Add 2 mL, Tween-20
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL, Tween-20 . Stir well to mix.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store Binding Buffer BB buffer in...
steps.instruction: Store Binding Buffer BB buffer in a flammables cupboard at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Once dissolved, make up to 2 L with Isopropanol (approx
steps.instruction: Once dissolved, make up to 2 L with Isopropanol (approx. 800 mL ) using a 1 L graduated cylinder.

steps.title: Add 1250 mL, freshly drawn milliQ...
steps.instruction: Add 1250 mL, freshly drawn milliQ water to a 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Weigh out 2
steps.instruction: Weigh out 2.388 kg, GuHCl in aliquots using a 3 L beaker and carefully add to 5 L beaker. Stir and heat to 60 °C to dissolve. A sterile pipette may be required to stir.

steps.title: Once dissolved, make up to 5 L with Isopropanol (approx
steps.instruction: Once dissolved, make up to 5 L with Isopropanol (approx. 2 L ) using a 1 L graduated cylinder and transferring buffer to second 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Add 200 mL, 3M sodium acetate , pH 5
steps.instruction: Add 200 mL, 3M sodium acetate , pH 5.2 .

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 mL, Tween-20 . Stir well to mix.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store Binding Buffer BB buffer in...
steps.instruction: Store Binding Buffer BB buffer in a flammables cupboard at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).
